title: Getting started
excerpt: description: Create your first D1 database, define a schema, and query it from a Cloudflare Worker. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. * Creating your first database using D1, Cloudflare's native serverless SQL database. * Creating a schema and querying your database via the command-line.
